zh.lifeSummary: 當John Blount III於大約1385年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Blount II, of Sodington40歲，母親Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall39歲。他於1408年與Eleanor Blount在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可萊奧波利 莫特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1442年享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素斯 格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Blount III于大约1385年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Blount II, of Sodington40岁，母亲Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall39岁。他于1408年与Eleanor Blount在英国英格兰史洛普爾可萊奧波利 莫特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1442年享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾素斯 格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Blount III was born about 1385, in England, his father, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, was 40 and his mother, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, was 39. He married Eleanor Blount in 1408, in Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1442, at the age of 58, and was buried in South Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Blount III est né environ 1385, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Blount en 1408, à Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1442, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à South Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1408 in Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. it.lifeSummary: Quando John Blount III è nato il circa 1385 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Blount nel 1408, nel Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1442, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a South Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Blount IIIが約1385年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Blount II, of Sodingtonは40歳，母Isabella "Isabel" Cornwallは39歳であった。1408年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクレオブリー モーティマーでEleanor Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1442年に58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアソウス グロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Blount III(이)가 대략 1385년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blount II, of Sodington(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클리콥리 모르팀어에서 Eleanor Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1442년 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 소우스 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Blount III nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Blount em 1408, em Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1442, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em South Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Blount III родился около 1385 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Blount II, of Sodington было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Blount в 1408 г. в местности клеобури мортимир, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1442 г. в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности соут глоусестиршир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Blount III nació aproximadamente 1385, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Eleanor Blount en 1408, en Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1442, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en South Gloucestershire, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
